{{Quote|The area around Ten Mile Plateau is one of our most important tourist attractions.|An Ord Mantell representative|<ref name="The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos I: Hero's Trial">''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos I: Hero's Trial]]''</ref>}}
The '''Ten Mile Plateau''' was a plateau located to the north of [[Worlport/Legends|Worlport]], deep within the [[Scraplands/Legends|Scraplands]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]]. A [[stellar-energy station]] was established on the top of the plateau, but had been abandoned as of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Description==
A flat expanse of uplands within the Scraplands, Ten Mile Plateau stood above the smog and detritus that choked the region. Despite the lack of vegetation, [[Mantellian Savrip/Legends|Savrips]] and [[Reptavian/Legends|pterosaurs]] resided on the flat top of the plateau, keeping explorers at bay. A [[stellar-energy station]] was established on the top of the plateau circa [[1000 BBY/Legends|1000 BBY]] before being abandoned for reasons that were never clearly discovered.<ref name="MPQ" />

[[File:Classic_02_03.jpg|thumb|250px|[[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] approaches Ten Mile Plateau in a [[Skyhopper/Legends|skyhopper]].]]

Following the destruction of the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|first Death Star]], the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Skorr/Legends|Skorr]] used the energy station as his base of operations, and held [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] captive there to lure [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] into his [[Mission to Ord Mantell (0 ABY)|trap]]. Fortunately for the [[Heroes of Yavin/Legends|Heroes of Yavin]], Solo and [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] outwitted Skorr and returned with Skywalker and Organa to the local [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]].<ref name="TBHoOM" />
